dataset.description: Configurable parameters to construct the dataset for a BEVFusion experiment.

box_type_3d.description: 3D bounding boxes type to be used when training.
box_type_3d.title: 3d bbox type in training

cam2img.description: Camera instrinsic matrix for single file inference
cam2img.title: camera instrinsics

classes.description: A List of the classes to be trained.
classes.title: list of classes

gt_box_type.description: 3D bounding boxes type in ground truth.
gt_box_type.title: 3d bbox type in ground truth

img_file.description: Image file for single file inference
img_file.title: infer image file

lidar2cam.description: Lidar to camera extrinsic matrix for single file inference
lidar2cam.title: lidar to camera extrinsic

num_views.description: Number of camera view in dataset.
num_views.title: number of camera view

origin.description: The origin of the given center point in ground truth 3D bounding boxes.
origin.title: bbox center origin

pc_file.description: Point cloud file for single file inference
pc_file.title: infer point cloud file

per_sequence.description: Whether to save results in per sequence format.
per_sequence.title: is per sequence

point_cloud_dim.description: Input lidar point cloud data dimension
point_cloud_dim.title: point cloud data dimension

root_dir.description: A path to the root directory of the given dataset
root_dir.title: root directory of the dataset

test_dataset.description: Configurable parameters to construct the test dataset.

ann_file.description: A path to the annotation pkl file
ann_file.title: annotation file

batch_size.description: The batch size for training and validation
batch_size.title: batch size

data_prefix.description: Corresponding data prefix for points and images
data_prefix.title: data prefix for points and images

num_workers.description: The number of parallel workers processing data
num_workers.title: num workers

pin_memory.description:
Flag to enable the dataloader to allocate pagelocked memory for faster
                       of data between the CPU and GPU.
pin_memory.title: pin_memory

repeat_time.description: The number of repetition of the dataset when training.
repeat_time.title: dataset repeat number

train_dataset.description: Configurable parameters to construct the train dataset.

ann_file.description: A path to the annotation pkl file
ann_file.title: annotation file

batch_size.description: The batch size for training and validation
batch_size.title: batch size

data_prefix.description: Corresponding data prefix for points and images
data_prefix.title: data prefix for points and images

num_workers.description: The number of parallel workers processing data
num_workers.title: num workers

pin_memory.description:
Flag to enable the dataloader to allocate pagelocked memory for faster
                       of data between the CPU and GPU.
pin_memory.title: pin_memory

repeat_time.description: The number of repetition of the dataset when training.
repeat_time.title: dataset repeat number

val_dataset.description: Configurable parameters to construct the validation dataset.

ann_file.description: A path to the annotation pkl file
ann_file.title: annotation file

batch_size.description: The batch size for training and validation
batch_size.title: batch size

data_prefix.description: Corresponding data prefix for points and images
data_prefix.title: data prefix for points and images

num_workers.description: The number of parallel workers processing data
num_workers.title: num workers

pin_memory.description:
Flag to enable the dataloader to allocate pagelocked memory for faster
                       of data between the CPU and GPU.
pin_memory.title: pin_memory

repeat_time.description: The number of repetition of the dataset when training.
repeat_time.title: dataset repeat number

evaluate.description: Configurable parameters to construct the evaluator for a BEVFusion experiment.

checkpoint.description: Path to the checkpoint used for evaluation.
checkpoint.title: Checkpoint path

gpu_ids.description:
List of GPU IDs to run the evaluation on. The length of this list
        must be equal to the number of gpus in evaluate.num_gpus.
gpu_ids.title: GPU IDs

num_gpus.description: The number of GPUs to run the evaluation job.
num_gpus.title: Number of GPUs

num_nodes.description: Number of nodes to run the evaluation on. If > 1, then multi-node is enabled.
num_nodes.title: Number of nodes

results_dir.description: Path to where all the assets generated from a task are stored.
results_dir.title: Results directory

input_modality.description: Input modality for the model. Set True for each modality to use.
input_modality.title: input modality

manual_seed.description: Optional manual seed. Seed is set when the value is given in spec file.
manual_seed.title: manual seed

model.description: Configurable parameters to construct the model for a BEVFusion experiment.

bbox_head.description: Configurable parameters to construct the bounding box head for the bevfusion model.

bbox_coder.description: The configuration for bounding box encoder.

score_threshold.description: Score threshold to filter bounding boxes in box encoder.
score_threshold.title: score threshold

cross_attn_cfg.description: The configuration for cross attention module.

embed_dims.description: Number of input channels for attention layer.
embed_dims.title: embedding dimensions

norm_cfg.description: The configuration of normalization for transformer decoder layer.
norm_cfg.title: normalization config

self_attn_cfg.description: The configuration for self attention module.

embed_dims.description: Number of input channels for attention layer.
embed_dims.title: embedding dimensions

in_channels.description: Number of channels in the input feature map.
in_channels.title: input channels

loss_bbox.description: The configuration for bounding box loss.
loss_bbox.title: bounding box loss configuration

data_preprocessor.description: Configurable parameters to construct the preprocessor for the bevfusion model.

bgr_to_rgb.description: whether to convert image from BGR to RGB.
bgr_to_rgb.title: no convert bgr to rgb

mean.description: The input mean for RGB frames
mean.title: input mean per pixel

pad_size_divisor.description: The size of padded image should be divisible.
pad_size_divisor.title: pad size divisor

std.description: The input standard deviation per pixel for RGB frames
std.title: input std per pixel

type.description: Name of Data Pre-processor for 3D Fusion
type.title: Data Pre-processor Type

fusion_layer.description: Configurable parameters to construct the fusion layer for the bevfusion model.

in_channels.description: The number of input channels for fusion layer.
in_channels.title: input channels

out_channels.description: The number of output channels for fusion layer.
out_channels.title: output channels

img_backbone.description: Configurable parameters to construct the camera image backbone for the bevfusion model.

convert_weights.description: The flag indicates whether the pre-trained model is from the original repo.
convert_weights.title: convert weights

depths.description: Depths of each Swin Transformer stage.
depths.title: swin transformer depth

mlp_ratio.description: Ratio of mlp hidden dim to embedding dim.
mlp_ratio.title: mlp ratio

num_heads.description: Number of attention head of each stage.
num_heads.title: number of heads

patch_norm.description: If True, add normalization after patch embedding.
patch_norm.title: patch normalization

qk_scale.description: Override default qk scale of head_dim ** -0.5 if set.
qk_scale.title: qk scale

qkv_bias.description: If True, add a learnable bias to query, key, value.
qkv_bias.title: qkv bias

type.description: Name of Image Backbone for 3D Fusion
type.title: Image Backbone Type

with_cp.description: Use checkpoint or not. Using checkpoint will save some memory while slowing down the training speed.
with_cp.title: with checkpoint

img_neck.description: Configurable parameters to construct the camera image neck for the bevfusion model.

act_cfg.description: The configuration of activation for image neck.
act_cfg.title: activation config

in_channels.description: The number of input channels for image neck.
in_channels.title: input channels

norm_cfg.description: The configuration of normalization for image neck.
norm_cfg.title: normalization config

num_outs.description: The number of outputput for image neck.
num_outs.title: number of output

out_channels.description: The number of output channels for image neck.
out_channels.title: output channels

upsample_cfg.description: The configuration of upsampling for image neck.
upsample_cfg.title: upsampling config

pts_backbone.description: Configurable parameters to construct the lidar pofort cloud backbone for the bevfusion model.

conv_cfg.description: The configuration of convolution layers for lidar backbone.
conv_cfg.title: convolution config

in_channels.description: The number of input channels for lidar backbone.
in_channels.title: input channels

layer_nums.description: The number of layer in each stage for lidar backbone.
layer_nums.title: number of layer

layer_strides.description: Number of layers in each stage for lidar backbone.
layer_strides.title: number of layer

norm_cfg.description: The configuration of normalization for lidar backbone.
norm_cfg.title: normalization config

out_channels.description: The number of output channels for lidar backbone.
out_channels.title: output channels

pts_middle_encoder.description: Configurable parameters to construct the lidar encoder for the bevfusion model.

block_type.description: Type of the block to use.
block_type.title: block type

in_channels.description: The number of input channels for lidar encoder.
in_channels.title: input channels

norm_cfg.description: The configuration of normalization for lidar encoder.
norm_cfg.title: normalization config

sparse_shape.description: The sparse shape of input tensor.
sparse_shape.title: sparse shape

pts_neck.description: Configurable parameters to construct the lidar neck for the bevfusion model.

in_channels.description: The number of input channels for lidar neck.
in_channels.title: input channels

norm_cfg.description: The configuration of normalization for lidar neck.
norm_cfg.title: normalization config

out_channels.description: The number of output channels for lidar neck.
out_channels.title: output channels

upsample_cfg.description: The configuration of upsample layers for lidar neck.
upsample_cfg.title: upsample configuration

upsample_strides.description: Strides used to upsample the feature map for lidar neck.
upsample_strides.title: upsample strides

use_conv_for_no_stride.description: Whether to use conv when stride is 1.
use_conv_for_no_stride.title: use convolution for stride 1

pts_voxel_encoder.description: Configurable parameters to construct the lidar pofort cloud voxel encoder for the bevfusion model.

view_transform.description: Configurable parameters to construct the camera view transform for the bevfusion model.

in_channels.description: The number of input channels for view transform.
in_channels.title: input channels

out_channels.description: The number of output channels for view transform.
out_channels.title: output channels

results_dir.description: Path to where all the assets generated from a task are stored.
results_dir.title: Results directory

train.description: Configurable parameters to construct the trainer for a BEVFusion experiment.

checkpoint_interval.description: The interval (in epochs) at which a checkpoint will be saved. Helps resume training.
checkpoint_interval.title: Checkpoint interval

gpu_ids.description:
List of GPU IDs to run the training on. The length of this list
        must be equal to the number of gpus in train.num_gpus.
gpu_ids.title: GPU IDs

lr_scheduler.description: Hyper parameters to configure the learning rate scheduler.
lr_scheduler.title: learning rate scheduler.

num_epochs.description: Number of epochs to run the training.
num_epochs.title: Number of epochs

num_gpus.description: The number of GPUs to run the train job.
num_gpus.title: Number of GPUs

num_nodes.description: Number of nodes to run the training on. If > 1, then multi-node is enabled.
num_nodes.title: Number of nodes

optimizer.description: Hyper parameters to configure the optimizer

betas.description: The moving average parameter for adaptive learning rate.
betas.title: moving average beta

clip_grad.description: Clip the gradient norm of an iterable of parameters.
clip_grad.title: clip gradient norm

lr.description: The initial learning rate for training the model.
lr.title: learning rate

type.description: Type of optimizer used to train the network.
type.title: Optimizer

wrapper_type.description: Opitmizer Wrapper in MMengine. AmpOptimWrapper to enables mixed precision training
wrapper_type.title: Optimizer wrapper

optimizer.title: optimizer

pretrained_checkpoint.description: Path to a pre-trained BEVFusion model to initialize the current training from.

results_dir.description: Path to where all the assets generated from a task are stored.
results_dir.title: Results directory

resume.description: Whether to resume the training or not.
resume.title: Is resume

resume_training_checkpoint_path.description: Path to the checkpoint to resume training from.
resume_training_checkpoint_path.title: Resume checkpoint path

seed.description: The seed for the initializer in PyTorch. If < 0, disable fixed seed.
seed.title: Seed for randomization

validation_interval.description:
The interval (in epochs) at which a evaluation
        will be triggered on the validation dataset.
validation_interval.title: Validation interval

inference.description: Configurable parameters to construct the inferencer for a BEVFusion experiment.

checkpoint.description: Path to the checkpoint used for inference.
checkpoint.title: Checkpoint path

gpu_ids.description:
List of GPU IDs to run the inference on. The length of this list
        must be equal to the number of gpus in inference.num_gpus.
gpu_ids.title: GPU IDs

num_gpus.description: The number of GPUs to run the inference job.
num_gpus.title: Number of GPUs

num_nodes.description: Number of nodes to run the inference on. If > 1, then multi-node is enabled.
num_nodes.title: Number of nodes

results_dir.description: Path to where all the assets generated from a task are stored.
results_dir.title: Results directory

show.description: Whether to show the 3D visualizaiton on screen
show.title: show 3D visualization
